title: SteerGrounding
description: Desk objects and rails refs riding into a steer or an ask. Source: the grounding object in POST /api/ask and POST /api/coders/{key}/steer (holdspeak/grounding.py + grounding_rails.py, Phase 83/87/88). Capped at 16 refs total; the hub hydrates from its own store, refuses unknown ids by name.
